case_title: ADVANCE MAGAZINE PUBLISHERS, INC. VS. DAVID LEACH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEACH, DAVID

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADVANCE MAGAZINE PUBLISHERS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEACH, DAVID JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADVANCE MAGAZINE PUBLISHERS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEACH, DAVID $408,220.00 PRINCIPAL, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $408,555.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
